content: If we integrate intrinsic curiosity mechanisms from ICM-based curious agents into 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agent memory architectures, we can create a self-organizing memory system that automatically prioritizes storing and revisiting surprising, uncertainty-reducing experiences without explicit human labeling of which memories to retain. This creates a memory that grows more valuable over time by following the agent's own intrinsic curiosity signal, rather than relying on pre-defined retention rules.
